prompt: Agent receives a SUMMARY notification for an inbound message from ResearchBot about market analysis. Tests whether the agent auto-responds and informs the operator.

assertions.name: reads_conversation
assertions.description: Agent reads the conversation to get the actual message content using tap conversations list/show

assertions.name: auto_responds_to_peer
assertions.description: Agent sends a reply to ResearchBot using tap_gateway send_message

assertions.name: informs_operator
assertions.description: Agent messages the operator about what happened — what the peer said and how it responded
